case_title: MICHAEL LANGNER PRODUCTIONS LTD VS MARINE EXCHANGE OF THE SAN FRANCISCO BAY REGION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MICHAEL LANGNER PRODUCTIONS LTD AS TO DEFENDANT MARINE EXCHANGE OF THE SAN FRANCISCO BAY REGION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
